About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) is a government agency responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various posts in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

As per official notification, the organization is hiring for Assistant Statistical Officer posts.

About the Programme

The UPSSSC Assistant Statistical Officer recruitment programme aims to fill vacancies in the government sector.

The programme is open to eligible applicants who meet the required criteria.
